introSection: Crazy Mouse is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently under construction at Curry's Fun Park Portrush in Portrush, County Antrim, Northern Ireland, UK.
fullText: Crazy Mouse is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently under construction at Curry's Fun Park Portrush in Portrush, County Antrim, Northern Ireland, UK.
